overview: A full-featured browser clicker game where you click a giant coin to earn currency, buy upgrades, and watch your passive income grow — all saved automatically so your progress is never lost.
features: Clickable coin with satisfying animations and floating +N text
Multiple purchasable upgrades: click boosters, auto-clickers, multipliers
Passive income that ticks every second while the page is open
Persistent save — your coins and upgrades restore on reload
